description: Reporting or optimizing training accuracy as if it measured real-world performance, masking severe overfitting.
body: Failure mode: success is judged by training-set performance, which a high-capacity model can drive arbitrarily high by memorizing, so the model fails on any new input. Detection signals: training accuracy near perfect while validation lags badly; the train/validation gap widens with more epochs; production results collapse. Do not use training metrics to judge generalization. Safer fallback: report validation and held-out test metrics, monitor the train/val gap, and add regularization or data when the gap grows.
